## Database Tables Found
No local `supabase/migrations/` files exist. The schema was applied directly to the Supabase project instance via the SQL editor as per the original brief.
Expected existing tables based on original brief:
`profiles`, `documents`, `signatures`, `tasks`, `comments`, `spreadsheets`, `notifications`, `mine_simulation`.

## Auth Pattern in Use
Supabase Auth is used. Found `@supabase/ssr` indicating Server-Side Rendering setup for Supabase auth (likely using middleware to protect routes).

## Design Tokens in Use
Tailwind config defines:
- Colors: `gold`, `onyx`, `charcoal`, `navy`, `slate`, `smoke`, `glass`, `border`, `text-primary`, `text-secondary`, etc.
- Fonts: `Playfair Display` (display), `Cormorant Garamond` (heading), `DM Sans` (body), `JetBrains Mono` (mono)
- Utilities: custom `glass` backdrop blur, box shadows, animations (`pulse-gold`, `float`, `fade-in`, `slide-up`, `count-up`)

## Gaps Identified (features partially built or missing)
- File upload system needs extension to support the new `accepted-types` logic and Google Docs-style drop zone.
- `tiptap` integration for Google Docs parity is completely missing (not installed).
- Image handling within documents.
- PDF generation/signing and Adobe Acrobat parity features.
- Presentation Builder (Gamma AI parity).
- Real-time collaboration hub.
- Trash can, user attribution tracking, and workspace management features are either incomplete or missing based on the Phase list.
